productTitle: Universal case for MikroTik LHG models
name: Universal case for MikroTik LHG models
title: Universal case for MikroTik LHG models
short_description: Universal case for Mikrotik LHG-60, LHG-5 and LHG-2 devices
description: The JH-LHG enclosure is designed to provide complete environmental protection for your MikroTik LHG series devices. Manufactured from UV-stabilized polypropylene and painted aluminum, it shields your hardware from snow, frost, dust, and other harsh weather conditions without compromising performance. Thanks to its innovative design, the unit’s heat prevents snow and frost accumulation on the radome, ensuring uninterrupted operation even in severe climates. The JH-LHG supports installation on either the right or left side, offering flexibility for various setups. Compatible with LHG-60 GHz (all models) and LHG-5 GHz 24.5 dBi gain models (requires LHG mount or solidMount), as well as LHG-2 (mount or solidMount also required), it ensures full radio functionality in challenging environments. Lightweight and compact, it blends into your setup without requiring changes to the LHG unit.

detailed_description.heading: All-Weather Protection for LHG
detailed_description.text: The JH-LHG enclosure is designed to provide complete environmental protection for your MikroTik LHG series devices. Manufactured from UV-stabilized polypropylene and painted aluminum, it shields your hardware from snow, frost, dust, and other harsh weather conditions without compromising performance. Thanks to its innovative design, the unit’s heat prevents snow and frost accumulation on the radome, ensuring uninterrupted operation even in severe climates. The JH-LHG supports installation on either the right or left side, offering flexibility for various setups. Compatible with LHG-60 GHz (all models) and LHG-5 GHz 24.5 dBi gain models (requires LHG mount or solidMount), as well as LHG-2 (mount or solidMount also required), it ensures full radio functionality in challenging environments. Lightweight and compact, it blends into your setup without requiring changes to the LHG unit.

detailed_description.heading: Easy Installation
detailed_description.text: Installing the JH-LHG is quick and straightforward, requiring no modification to the LHG’s original construction. The package includes everything needed for assembly: a front radome, back cover, collar, cable cap, and a set of stainless steel fasteners. Ready for all types of original holders, the enclosure simplifies deployment while maintaining secure and durable mounting. This solution ensures long-term protection for your radio equipment and helps maintain optimal performance in demanding weather. Its robust materials and smart design make it an essential accessory for professional wireless setups in outdoor and industrial environments. With JH-LHG, your LHG stays functional and reliable year-round, even under the most challenging conditions.
